'''âz-y-p''' ('''zayapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubylate|rubylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubylate|rubylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| zayapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zayapithi|zayapithi]] || [[word:zayapiji|zayapiji]] || [[word:zayapishi|zayapishi]] || [[word:zayapi|zayapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayaputhuth|zayaputhuth]] || [[word:zayapujuj|zayapujuj]] || [[word:zayapushush|zayapushush]] || [[word:zayap|zayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayaputhu|zayaputhu]] || [[word:zayapuju|zayapuju]] || [[word:zayapushu|zayapushu]] || [[word:zayapu|zayapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayapufuth|zayapufuth]] || [[word:zayapufuj|zayapufuj]] || [[word:zayapufush|zayapufush]] || [[word:zayapuf|zayapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zayapethe|zayapethe]] || [[word:zayapeje|zayapeje]] || [[word:zayapeshe|zayapeshe]] || [[word:zayape|zayape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayapothoth|zayapothoth]] || [[word:zayapojoj|zayapojoj]] || [[word:zayaposhosh|zayaposhosh]] || [[word:zayap|zayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayapotho|zayapotho]] || [[word:zayapojo|zayapojo]] || [[word:zayaposho|zayaposho]] || [[word:zayapo|zayapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayapofoth|zayapofoth]] || [[word:zayapofoj|zayapofoj]] || [[word:zayapofosh|zayapofosh]] || [[word:zayapof|zayapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zayapĂŠthĂŠ|zayapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zayapĂŠjĂŠ|zayapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zayapĂŠshĂŠ|zayapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zayapĂŠ|zayapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zayapathath|zayapathath]] || [[word:zayapajaj|zayapajaj]] || [[word:zayapashash|zayapashash]] || [[word:zayap|zayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zayapatha|zayapatha]] || [[word:zayapaja|zayapaja]] || [[word:zayapasha|zayapasha]] || [[word:zayapa|zayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zayapafath|zayapafath]] || [[word:zayapafaj|zayapafaj]] || [[word:zayapafash|zayapafash]] || [[word:zayapaf|zayapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zayapasha|zayapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozayapasha|gozayapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizayapasha|gokizayapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zayapnĂŒsha|zayapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozayapnknĂŒsha|gozayapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizayapnĂŒsha|gokizayapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zayapshĂ«sha|zayapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozayapnkshĂ«sha|gozayapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizayapshĂ«sha|gokizayapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zayaprosha|zayaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozayapnkrosha|gozayapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizayaprosha|gokizayaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zayapmusha|zayapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayapnkmusha|gozayapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayapmusha|gokizayapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zayapsherasha|zayapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozayapnksherasha|gozayapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizayapsherasha|gokizayapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zayapngasha|zayapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozayapnkngasha|gozayapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizayapngasha|gokizayapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zayapyasha|zayapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozayapnkyasha|gozayapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizayapyasha|gokizayapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zayapyamasha|zayapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozayapnkyamasha|gozayapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizayapyamasha|gokizayapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zayapnĂŒshĂ«sha|zayapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozayapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozayapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizayapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizayapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zayapnĂŒrosha|zayapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozayapnknĂŒrosha|gozayapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizayapnĂŒrosha|gokizayapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayapnĂŒmusha|zayapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayapnknĂŒmusha|gozayapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayapnĂŒmusha|gokizayapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zayapshĂ«nĂŒsha|zayapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozayapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozayapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizayapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizayapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zayapshĂ«rosha|zayapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozayapnkshĂ«rosha|gozayapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizayapshĂ«rosha|gokizayapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayapshĂ«musha|zayapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayapnkshĂ«musha|gozayapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayapshĂ«musha|gokizayapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zayapronĂŒsha|zayapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozayapnkronĂŒsha|gozayapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizayapronĂŒsha|gokizayapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zayaproshĂ«sha|zayaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozayapnkroshĂ«sha|gozayapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizayaproshĂ«sha|gokizayaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayapromusha|zayapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayapnkromusha|gozayapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayapromusha|gokizayapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zayapmunĂŒsha|zayapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozayapnkmunĂŒsha|gozayapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizayapmunĂŒsha|gokizayapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zayapmushĂ«sha|zayapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozayapnkmushĂ«sha|gozayapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizayapmushĂ«sha|gokizayapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zayapmurosha|zayapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozayapnkmurosha|gozayapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizayapmurosha|gokizayapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zayap|zayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠp|zĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozayap|hozayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠyĂŠp|hozĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozayap|hohozayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠyĂŠp|hohozĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzayap|nĂŒzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠyĂŠp|nĂŒzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzayap|nĂŒnĂŒzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠyĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzayap|nĂŻzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠyĂŠp|nĂŻzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzayap|nĂŻnĂŻzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠyĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzayap|luzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠyĂŠp|luzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzayap|luluzayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠyĂŠp|luluzĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizayap|lizayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠyĂŠp|lizĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizayap|lilizayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠyĂŠp|lilizĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozayap|kozayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠyĂŠp|kozĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozayap|kokozayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠyĂŠp|kokozĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezayap|kezayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠyĂŠp|kezĂŠyĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezayap|kekezayap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠyĂŠp|kekezĂŠyĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
